title: lycopodium suffruticosum
intro: Lycopodium suffruticosum, also known as club moss, is a type of ancient vascular plant belonging to the lycopodiopsida class. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lycopodium suffruticosum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Lycopodium suffruticosum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in natural remedies and folk medicine.
